DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-29-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND XAVIER BECERRA'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendants' Demurrer to Plaintiffs' First Amended Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
